chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3165 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 14240/2019 2. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Sufyan Zaman, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Per learned counsel, notice dated 30.04.2019 has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. He seeks that the notice be adjudicated by the authority vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel further states that it may be just and proper for the respondents not to take any coercive action against the petitioner pending the aforesaid. Learned A.A.G. articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
